title: pomaria sandersonii
intro: Pomaria sandersonii, also known as the Sanderson's pomaria or Sanderson's bean, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pomaria sandersonii include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create remedies for a range of health concerns.
